title: Supply Chain Manager - MSC India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - MSC India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the MSC India family as a Supply Chain Manager in Gwalior. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About MSC India:
MSC India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MSC India!
